items.title: UPDATED Notre Dame Football Recruiting Rankings for the 2027 cycle
items.summary: Rivals recently updated their recruiting rankings which has caused some Notre Dame football commits to receive another star next to their name. items.title: Are there really major injury questions for Notre Dame this year?
items.summary: Fans of Notre Dame football have become accustomed to bad injury news before and during the season. Look, you’re not alone. Many college football programs deal with injuries much in the same way as the Irish, because that’s just the name of the game out there. That’s what depth is for. Injuries suck and there’s […]

items.title: Looking Back at Notre Dame’s 2001 Victory Over Navy
items.summary: For decades, Notre Dame’s annual meeting with Navy was defined by one extraordinary statistic. Entering their November 17, 2001 matchup at Notre Dame Stadium, the Fighting Irish had defeated the Midshipmen 37 consecutive times. It was the longest winning streak by one opponent over another in major college football history, transforming every meeting into another […]

items.title: New Rivals rankings clearly show Notre Dame’s return to being an elite recruiting program
items.summary: Rivals just released its updated Top 300 football recruiting rankings, and expanded its 5-Star rankings. The Notre Dame Fighting Irish are well represented here with its 2027 class now with four 5-Stars in the current Rivals rankings. items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 4-Star Chicago LB Roman Igwebuike commits to the Irish
items.summary: The Notre Dame Football recruiting machine continues its acquisition of blue-chip talent for its 2027 class. On Saturday, 4-Star linebacker Roman Igwebuike gave his public commitment to Marcus Freeman snd the Notre Dame Fighting Irish. The 6’3” 220 pound linebacker from Mount Carmel High School in Chicago, Illinois, chose the Irish over his other finalists […]
